title: SleepTime
description: Shows you how long until you can sleep, toggle by a key.
body:
Shows you how long until you can sleep in the corner of your screen, toggle by a key.

When it is night, it will show nothing.

Default key: O

![Time in the corner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe73f1f04c896903a5d5e6d5831cfff2e0102a8.png)
